sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92705" key="r(opaloma/xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥοπᾰλο-μάχος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n92705.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κορυνήτης</ref></xr>, Hsch.sub h.v.</sense> </entryFree>
